name: Beef Steak with Herb Garnish
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb Rib eye or sirloin steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the herb garnish ahead of time to allow flavors to blend.
2. Combine onion, parsley, lemon juice, oil, garlic, salt, and pepper in a glass bowl; let stand at room temperature for at least 2 hours.
3. At mealtime, broil or saute meat to desired doneness in a heavy frypan lightly brushed with oil.
4. Spoon herb garnish over each serving.
